title: Fix docs pre-publication issues: placeholder GIFs, TOC collapse, swarm SVG alignment

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Three issues: (1) Comment out 5 placeholder GIF references that don't have generated files yet, (2) Investigate TOC collapse with full-width images, (3) Fix swarm SVG arrow/text alignment — multiple issues with opacity-based shapes instead of multiply blend, and arrow positioning
